positions.title: AI Solutions Engineer (Value Engineer – Applied AI Champion)

bullets.text: Architected an agentic AI solution for dispute classification, automated resolution, and master data correction — spanning Celonis Process Orchestration, event-driven automations (Make), and an LLM-based annotation agent — validated through a 3-month live PoC that directly enabled a $4M contract expansion.

Led a $3.5M annual renewal for a global retail pharmaceutical client by architecting and scaling enterprise-grade process intelligence solutions on the Celonis platform, driving over $100M in realized value and securing a 2-year enterprise agreement through demonstrated ROI and stakeholder alignment.

Recovered an $800K ARR churn-risk account by driving a 24-week value sprint that applied Celonis process intelligence, Make automations, and advanced analytics to surface $60M in free cash flow opportunity, $5M in P&L impact, and a clear path to enterprise-scale deployment.

Secured a $140K license expansion for one of the world's largest tobacco manufacturers by building an AI agent that automatically reviewed and released allocation blocks, unlocking up to $1B in blocked revenue; delivered the PoC onsite to 10+ senior stakeholders.
Led technical workshops and executive demos for academic and enterprise audiences, showcasing applied AI use cases and platform capabilities to drive product adoption and technical credibility.

Executed a PoC LLM application that automatically mapped purchase order descriptions to the correct tax material groups, reducing overpaid taxes and missed-tax penalties; the solution directly supported a $1.5M AI-led commercial deal and was moved to production.

Designed and deployed a production-grade LLM system combining GPT-4o, OCR (Docling), and advanced prompt engineering to automate Master Service Agreement analysis, reducing manual review time by 80% across 1,000+ documents while improving extraction accuracy in real-world legal workflows.

Designed and implemented a semantic clustering pipeline using S-BERT and ChromaDB to process 2M+ purchase orders for a Fortune 500 automotive client, identifying duplicate orders and uncovering millions in cost savings while partnering closely with operations teams to drive adoption.
Developed clustering ML model using Python and SciKit Learn to identify product affinity patterns, enabling targeted marketing campaigns that drove measurable sales growth across 17 key SKUs.
Applied SQL and Python for data preprocessing and ETL workflows, identifying $20K+ in supply chain inefficiencies through data-driven analysis.
Drove business growth by leading community outreach initiatives and establishing strategic relationships with over 20 community organizations.
Engineered REST API endpoints using NestJS, TypeScript, and AWS services (Lambda, EC2, S3, DynamoDB) for high-speed rail company's mobile application serving 50K+ users.
Automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and YAML scripts, reducing deployment time by 60% and enabling rapid iteration for production releases across iOS and Android platforms.
Contributed to successful production launch by implementing backend integration, monitoring performance metrics post-release, and resolving critical bugs to ensure maximum uptime.
bullets.impact: Shipped to production across iOS & Android

bullets.text: Redesigned developer console using React.js, Node.js, and JavaScript, improving UX/UI and driving 20% increase in web traffic and developer engagement metrics.
Built automated notification system using Python, Flask, and Discord API, increasing team visibility into company milestones by 300% and improving cross-functional communication.
Mentored three junior engineers through code reviews and technical guidance, accelerating onboarding time by 50% and establishing best practices for the engineering team.
